title: Zoho Mail Login Issue
description: Troubleshooting steps for users unable to log into Zoho Mail.

steps.title: Verify Credentials
steps.instruction: Ensure you are typing your complete email address (e.g., user@company.com) and the correct password.

steps.title: Check Account Expiration
steps.instruction: If you recently changed your password, ensure your password manager has the updated credentials.

steps.title: Clear Browser Cache
steps.instruction: Clear your browser cache and cookies, or try logging in using an Incognito/Private browsing window.

steps.title: Check Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
steps.instruction: If prompted for a 2FA code, ensure you have your authenticator app or are able to receive SMS codes.

steps.title: Contact IT Support
steps.instruction: If login still fails, your account might be locked due to too many failed attempts. Please raise a ticket to have it unlocked.
